summary: Tested max_credit_percentage feature for store credit usage limiting. Backend APIs (GET/PUT /api/credits/settings, POST /api/credits/validate) correctly return and persist max_credit_percentage field. Admin UI displays and updates the field correctly. Checkout page logic correctly calculates percentage cap.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend CreditSettings model includes max_credit_percentage field with default 0 (no limit)
GET /api/credits/settings includes backward compatibility for missing field
POST /api/credits/validate returns max_credit_percentage in response for frontend use
Admin UI (AdminCreditSettings.jsx) displays 'Max Credit % of Order' input with proper data-testid
Checkout page calculation: pctCap = Math.floor(totalBeforeCredits * (maxPct / 100)) is correct
Percentage cap applied BEFORE flat max_credit_per_order cap as documented
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing settings (max_credit_percentage=20 was pre-set via curl)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Max credit percentage feature fully tested and working. Current setting: max_credit_percentage=20 (meaning credits can cover up to 20% of order total). Example: Rs 100 order -> max Rs 20 credits usable. Checkout page getMaxCreditsUsable() function applies percentage cap before flat max cap.

backend_put_settings.details: PUT /api/credits/settings accepts and persists max_credit_percentage changes (tested 20->25->20)

backend_put_auth.details: PUT endpoint requires authentication (returns 401/403 for unauthenticated requests)

backend_validate_with_products.details: Validation works with actual product IDs

backend_consistency.details: Settings and validate endpoints return consistent max_credit_percentage values

frontend_admin_display.details: Admin Credit Settings page shows 'Max Credit % of Order' input with value=20

frontend_admin_update.details: Admin can change value, save, and changes persist after page reload

frontend_admin_label.details: Label shows 'Max % of order total payable via credits (0 = no limit)'

frontend_admin_info_box.details: 'How Credits Work' section shows 'Credits can cover up to 20% of order total'

checkout_page_layout.details: Checkout page displays Store Credits section with login prompt for non-logged-in users

checkout_percentage_logic.details: CheckoutPage.jsx line 119-122 correctly implements: pctCap = Math.floor(totalBeforeCredits * (maxPct / 100))

api_endpoints_verified: PUT /api/credits/settings - Accepts and persists max_credit_percentage (requires auth)
